chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D- 760 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For order on Stay application 3. For hearing of main case 07.8.2025 Mr.Noor Nabi Samo, Advocate for Petitioner Mr.Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh a/w SIP Niaz Ali on behalf of SHO PS Market, Hyderabad Mr.Zaheeruddin Sahito, Advocate representing SBCA ********** Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that respondent No.7 has constructed a house adjacent to that of the petitioner and has raised a third floor, which has completely obstructed the side window of the petitioner’s house. He further submits that the petitioner has lodged a complaint with the Director, Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA), Hyderabad Region (respondent No.2), (available at Page No.17 of the Court file), seeking directions to respondent No.7 to modify or halt the construction in a manner that preserves the petitioner’s right to air and light. However, the said complaint has not been decided and remains pending. Learned counsel states that the petitioner would be satisfied if appropriate directions are issued to respondent No.2 for expeditious disposal of the said complaint. Learned A.A.G and counsel appearing for SBCA do not oppose the request and assure that the petitioner’s complaint shall be decided strictly in accordance with law. 2 In view of the foregoing, the instant petition stands disposed of with directions to the Respondent No.2, to decide the Petitioner’s pending application/complaint after providing opportunity of hearing to all concerned in accordance with law within a week from today.

Learned counsel states that the petitioner would be satisfied if appropriate directions are issued to respondent No.2 for expeditious disposal of the said complaint. Learned A.A.G and counsel appearing for SBCA do not oppose the request and assure that the petitioner’s complaint shall be decided strictly in accordance with law. 2 In view of the foregoing, the instant petition stands disposed of with directions to the Respondent No.2, to decide the Petitioner’s pending application/complaint after providing opportunity of hearing to all concerned in accordance with law within a week from today. Office is directed to communicate a copy of this order to the learned A.A.G. for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
